card.name: Aaron's Reproach
card.text: Target artifact becomes a 4/4 Snake creature with deathtouch until end of turn. It's still an artifact.

card.name: Elisha's Justice
card.text: Destroy all creatures with power 2 or less and all tokens. Create a 3/3 Green Bear Token with Trample.

card.name: Centurion
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Centurion. Prevent all damage dealt to up to one target creature. If Jesus is on the battlefiled, return Centurion to your hand

card.name: Judas
card.text: {T}, When Judas enters, create two treasure tokens. {1}, {T}: Sacrifice Judas. Destroy target Legendary creature or Planeswalker. Create two treasure tokens.

card.name: Sodom
card.text: {T}: Add a Salt counter to Sodom. {T}: Add {C}. {T}, {4}: Remove 4 Salt counters from Sodom. Sacrifice it. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Walk on Water
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Draw a card. If Jesus is on the battlefield, reduce the cost of this spell by {2}

card.name: Adam's Rib
card.text: Sacrifice Adam's Rib: Create a 2/2 Human Token named Eve. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Judas' Kiss
card.text: Put a Finality counter on target creature. If that creture is legendary, create two treasure tokens.

card.name: Smite the Fig Tree
card.text: Destroy target Forest, Artifact, or creature with Flying.

card.name: Serenity
card.text: Exile all creatures from target player's graveyard. Draw a card and lose one life.

card.name: Pontius Pilate
card.text: When Pontius Pilate enters, put a Finality counter on target creature opponent controls. If that creature is legendary, gain RRR.

card.name: Dorcas
card.text: When Dorcas enters, gain two life. {T}: Target creature with power 2 or less gains indestructible until end of turn
